race.comment: SEETHRU (1) is spotting race fitness to a lot of rivals here, but it looks a suitable kick-off for the gelding who was a narrow runner-up in a Sandown BM70 last prep. Trialling like he can run a race. THUNDER HAWK (4) has been in the market at her last couple of starts but hasn't made an impression. This is much easier, however, so an improved showing would not shock. YOU NEVER CAN TELL (6) was in contention on the corner and ran a better race last start to finish a close third over 1512m at Geelong. Might have to do some work from the gate, but good enough with the right run. MARLION'S DREAM (2) ran below expectations last time at Pakenham, finishing fifth and beaten 4 lengths, but that was in 62 grade as were the two placings prior, so this is the easiest race he's seen this prep. BOW RIBBON (7) wasn't disgraced first-up then caught the eye late last time out when beaten less than 1.5 lengths at Seymour. Looks ready to peak.
